name: ingestigate
description: Investigative intelligence for AI agents. Ingest documents in 1,000+ formats (PDFs, emails, Office docs, spreadsheets, images, archives, and more), automatically extract 30+ entity types (people, organizations, emails, phones, crypto addresses), and explore a relationship graph showing how entities connect across your entire corpus. Deep-link evidence retrieval traces every connection back to the source document. Processing-aware responses ensure agents never hallucinate about incomplete data.
author: Ingestigate Inc.
